channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: EACC Report Exposes Widespread Sextortion in Kenya’s Public Services
item.description: A new report from the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) has uncovered how sextortion — the demand for sexual favours in exchange for jobs, promotions, or services — has become a growing for...

item.title: Re-examining Precolonial Filipino Identity and History
item.description: This article delves into the complexities of understanding precolonial Filipino identity, arguing that the romanticized or idealized vision often presented is a construct rather than an accurate histo...

item.title: Australian amateur astronomers awarded for discovering a planetary ring around a dwarf planet
item.description: A team of Australian amateur astronomers has achieved a groundbreaking discovery, identifying a planetary ring around the dwarf planet Quaoar—something previously thought impossible. Jonathan Bradshaw...

item.title: Kunal Kamra summons under breach‑of‑privilege law: a debate over satire, free speech and legislative power
item.description: Stand‑up comedian Kunal Kamra has been summoned by the privilege committee of the Maharashtra Legislative Council over a satirical video in which he mocked Deputy Chief Minister Eknath Shinde as a ‘tr...

item.title: Nigeria Newspaper Roundup: Tinubu, INEC, Politics, and Entertainment Headlines for April 11, 2026
item.description: This newspaper roundup brings together the major stories shaping public discussion in Nigeria on Saturday, 11th April, 2026. One of the leading headlines was President Bola Tinubu’s response to the ri...

item.title: Renault SA Launches Updated Triber Express Commercial Van
item.description: Renault South Africa has given its popular Triber Express light commercial vehicle a refresh, introducing the Express III model. Initially launched in 2020 as a locally converted version of the seven-...

item.title: Theater Review: Star Power Elevates PETA's Stage Adaptation of ‘Endo’
item.description: In this engaging theater review, seasoned critic Fred Hawson highlights how the star-studded cast brings new life to the stage adaptation of ‘Endo’ presented by the Philippine Educational Theater Asso...

item.title: Oleg Roldugin, investigative journalist, detained in Russia over alleged personal data misuse
item.description: Oleg Roldugin, a Russian investigative journalist for Novaya Gazeta, was detained on April 9, 2026, in a case involving alleged misuse of personal data. Masked security agents raided both his home and...

item.title: UK delays Chagos Islands sovereignty deal following US objection
item.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer has halted the United Kingdom’s Chagos Islands sovereignty agreement after the United States failed to provide formal approval, following pressure from President Donald...

item.title: Wife Surprises Husband with New Lexus and KSh 45,000 for Fuel on His Birthday
item.description: In a heartwarming display of love, Mummy Trevor went all out to surprise her husband, Daddy Trevor, on his birthday. The celebration began with a playful joke involving a toy car, which immediately br...

item.title: Kenya’s path to inclusive digital transformation through skills and access
item.description: This article by Jessy Kiveu, CEO of the ICT Authority of Kenya, dives deep into the country’s ongoing journey toward digital transformation. It opens with a scene from Garissa, where youths have just ...

item.title: Surge in U.S. soldiers refusing to fight over moral objections to war with Iran
item.description: A large and unexpected rise has been seen in American military personnel seeking to withdraw from service on moral grounds since the beginning of the US-Israeli war against Iran. According to the Cent...

item.title: How Desh Bandhu Gupta Built Lupin into a Global Pharmaceutical Powerhouse
item.description: The review of Made in India: The Story of Desh Bandhu Gupta, Lupin and Indian Pharma explores the fascinating rise of Desh Bandhu Gupta (DBG) and his company Lupin, one of India’s most successful phar...

item.title: Federal Government rejects US travel advisory, says Nigeria remains safe despite security concerns
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria don sharply reject the latest travel advisory wey the United States release, warning dem citizens make dem no travel come Nigeria. The American statement talk say e d...

item.title: Semi-Autonomous Legged Robots Could Accelerate Mars and Moon Exploration
item.description: A recent study published in Frontiers in Space Technologies explores the potential of four-legged robots, like Anybotics' ANYmal, for planetary exploration on Mars and the Moon. Unlike traditional whe...

item.title: British Tourist Dies and Several Injured After Bus Accident in La Gomera
item.description: A tragic accident occurred in La Gomera, Canary Islands, where a bus carrying 28 people, including 27 British tourists and a driver, crashed into a ravine while travelling on the GM-2 road. The incide...

item.title: Pakistan and Saudi Arabia Discuss Strengthening Economic and Strategic Ties
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif held a high-level meeting with Saudi Arabia's Finance Minister Mohammed bin Abdullah Al-Jadaan at the Prime Minister's House on Thursday. The meeting highlighted Pakistan...

item.title: U.S. and Israeli Reports Indicate Iran Retains Significant Missile Capability Despite Heavy Losses
item.description: According to U.S. and Israeli intelligence assessments cited by officials, Iran’s missile arsenal has been reduced by approximately half after recent strikes and countermeasures related to escalating ...

item.title: Nigeria: Government Launches System for Digital Student Records
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria has introduced a new digital system designed to track and manage students' academic records across the country. This initiative aims to improve the efficiency and tra...

item.title: Canberra Marathon 2026 kicks off with community spirit and diverse runners
item.description: The 2026 Canberra Marathon festival began on Saturday, April 11, with the 5km and 10km races drawing runners of all backgrounds to Lake Burley Griffin. Among them was Bianca, who founded a running clu...
